summary: Completed Android compatibility patch verification testing. All 5 requested features verified working on Android viewport (390x844): workspace tab strip visible with Chat tab, return-to-chat banner/button in non-chat modes, return-to-chat functionality, menu and settings link accessible, no runtime errors.
critical_code_review_comments: Workspace tab strip (data-testid='workspace-tablist') correctly visible on Android viewport with all 4 tabs (Chat/Scene/Cascade/Batch)
Return-to-chat banner (data-testid='workspace-chat-return-banner') correctly appears when activeTopTab !== 'chat'
Return-to-chat button (data-testid='workspace-return-chat-btn') correctly switches back to chat mode
ChatContext activeTopTab normalization handles 'roles' -> 'scene' migration and invalid values -> 'chat' fallback
Response panels become visible after returning to chat mode
Chat input area visible after returning to chat mode
Menu button (data-testid='chat-menu-trigger-btn') accessible on Android viewport
Settings link (data-testid='workspace-go-settings-btn') visible in side menu
No console errors or page errors observed during testing
seed_data_creation: Created test user account via registration flow for Android UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 Android compatibility patch testing complete. All features working on Android viewport (390x844): (1) Workspace tab strip visible with Chat/Scene/Cascade/Batch tabs. (2) When switching to non-chat modes (Scene/Cascade/Batch), return-to-chat banner appears with message 'Chat responses are hidden in [mode] mode.' and 'Return to chat' button. (3) Clicking 'Return to chat' button correctly switches activeTopTab back to 'chat', response panels become visible, and chat input area is accessible. (4) Menu button opens side workspace menu with Settings link at bottom. (5) No runtime errors observed. ChatContext.js has hardened activeTopTab normalization: 'roles' tab migrates to 'scene', invalid values fallback to 'chat'.
